purpose: Determine the specific reasons to reach out to a lead or customer based on gaps, errors, or anomalies detected in their LunaLend application. Each variant represents a distinct outreach trigger. Each sub_variant is a specific condition that, when matched, generates a reason to contact the applicant.
instruction: Evaluate the application record against each sub_variant condition. For every matched condition, generate one outreach reason. Combine all matched reasons into a single outreach summary per applicant. Do not reach out for clean checks. Prioritize critical and high severity items first in the outreach message.

variants.label: Missing Identity Information
variants.description: Core personal identity fields are absent. Applicant must provide these before any verification can proceed.
variants.outreach_trigger: We are missing key personal information needed to verify your identity.

sub_variants.label: SSN Missing
sub_variants.detect_when: ssn field is null, empty, or is_ssn_valid is false
sub_variants.outreach_line: Your Social Security Number (SSN) is missing or invalid. Please provide your SSN to continue.

sub_variants.label: Date of Birth Missing
sub_variants.detect_when: date_of_birth field is null or empty
sub_variants.outreach_line: Your date of birth is missing. Please provide your date of birth to continue.

sub_variants.label: VAT or EIN Missing
sub_variants.detect_when: vat field is null, empty, or is_vat_valid is false
sub_variants.outreach_line: Your VAT or EIN is missing or invalid. Please provide your business tax identification number.

sub_variants.label: Name Fields Contain Non-Name Data
sub_variants.detect_when: first_name or last_name contains a city, state, address, or clearly non-personal value
sub_variants.outreach_line: The name fields on your application appear to contain incorrect information. Please confirm your legal first and last name.

variants.label: Bank Statement Issues
variants.description: Submitted bank statements are personal instead of business, incomplete, or outdated. Business bank statements are required for underwriting.
variants.outreach_trigger: There is an issue with one or more of your submitted bank statements.

sub_variants.label: Personal Account Statements Submitted
sub_variants.detect_when: one or more statements have account_type of 'Personal' instead of 'Business'
sub_variants.outreach_line: One or more of your submitted bank statements are from a personal account. Please resubmit using business bank statements only.

sub_variants.label: Account Holder Name Does Not Match Business
sub_variants.detect_when: account_holder_name on statements does not match company name in user details and name_match_status is Mismatch
sub_variants.outreach_line: The name on your bank statements does not match your business name on file. Please confirm the account belongs to your business.
sub_variants.example_match: account_holder_name: 'JOHN ANTHONY VEGA', company: 'Hfe llc', name_match_status: 'Mismatch'

sub_variants.label: Bank Statements Not Recent
sub_variants.detect_when: most recent statement date is older than 60 days from the application processing date
sub_variants.outreach_line: Your bank statements are outdated. Please provide statements from the last 3 months.
sub_variants.example_match: most recent statement_date is more than 60 days before processed_at

sub_variants.label: Insufficient Number of Statements
sub_variants.detect_when: statements_count is less than the minimum required or has_minimum_statements is false
sub_variants.outreach_line: We require a minimum number of bank statements and your submission does not meet that requirement. Please provide additional statements.

variants.label: Active MCA or Debt Detected
variants.description: One or more bank statements show existing MCA or financing activity. This must be disclosed and reviewed before funding.
variants.outreach_trigger: We detected existing financing activity on your bank statements that requires clarification.

sub_variants.label: MCA Activity Found on Statement
sub_variants.detect_when: mca_details array on any statement is non-empty
sub_variants.outreach_line: We detected existing MCA or financing activity on your bank statements. Please disclose all current outstanding advances or loans.
sub_variants.example_match: mca_details: [{amount: 2006.31, company: 'KOALAFI DES:LEASE FUND'}] on March statement

sub_variants.label: Undisclosed MCA Not Self-Declared
sub_variants.detect_when: mca_details found on statements but no formal self-declaration or MCA disclosure form is present in the record
sub_variants.outreach_line: Please complete an MCA disclosure form listing all current advances, loans, or lease obligations.
sub_variants.example_match: mca_details present but no declaration document attached

variants.label: Identity Verification Mismatch
variants.description: Key identity fields do not match across the application or against verified sources.
variants.outreach_trigger: There is a mismatch in the identity information provided on your application.

sub_variants.label: Name Mismatch Between Application and Statements
sub_variants.outreach_line: The name on your application does not match the name on your bank statements. Please confirm your legal name and resubmit matching documents.

sub_variants.label: SSN Does Not Pass Validation
sub_variants.detect_when: is_ssn_valid is false and ssn is non-null
sub_variants.outreach_line: The SSN you provided could not be validated. Please double-check and resubmit your Social Security Number.

sub_variants.label: VAT or EIN Does Not Pass Validation
sub_variants.detect_when: is_vat_valid is false and vat is non-null
sub_variants.outreach_line: The VAT or EIN you provided could not be validated. Please verify and resubmit your business tax ID.

variants.label: Financial Profile Concerns
variants.description: Deposit amounts, revenue figures, or financial patterns raise questions that require applicant clarification.
variants.outreach_trigger: We have questions regarding the financial information reflected in your application.

sub_variants.label: Average Deposits Below Minimum Threshold
sub_variants.detect_when: average_deposits falls below the lender's minimum qualifying deposit threshold
sub_variants.outreach_line: The average monthly deposits across your submitted statements may not meet the minimum requirement. Please contact us to discuss your options.

sub_variants.label: Significant Deposit Spike in One Month
sub_variants.detect_when: any single month's total_deposits exceeds the average of all other months by more than 40%
sub_variants.outreach_line: We noticed an unusually high deposit in one of your statements. Please provide a brief explanation for this activity.
sub_variants.example_match: one month deposits significantly higher than trailing average

sub_variants.label: Mixed Personal and Business Deposits
sub_variants.detect_when: statements include a mix of personal and business account types
sub_variants.outreach_line: Your submitted statements include both personal and business accounts. Please resubmit using only business account statements.
sub_variants.example_match: 3 personal statements and 1 business statement submitted

variants.label: Fallback — Unclassified Outreach Reason
variants.description: Use this when a missing field, anomaly, or system note does not match any condition in VAR-001 through VAR-005. Typically triggered by the note or missing_fields array containing items not covered by existing variants.
variants.outreach_trigger: We noticed an issue with your application that requires your attention.
variants.instruction: Assign VAR-006 only after confirming no other variant applies. Use the raw note or missing_fields entry as the basis for the outreach_line. Rephrase it to be customer-facing and actionable.

sub_variants.label: System-Flagged Missing Field Not Covered by Other Variants
sub_variants.detect_when: missing_fields array contains an entry that does not map to any sub_variant in VAR-001 through VAR-005
sub_variants.outreach_line: Your application is missing required information. Please review and complete all fields before resubmitting.
sub_variants.example_match: any missing_fields entry not already handled by VAR-001 through VAR-005

sub_variants.label: System Note Contains Unstructured Warning
sub_variants.detect_when: note field is non-null and contains flagged content not represented in any other variant
sub_variants.outreach_line: Our system flagged an issue with your application. A member of our team will reach out to assist you.
sub_variants.example_match: note: 'The following fields were empty: vat, date_of_birth, ssn'

output_format.description: Expected LLM output when this schema is used to generate outreach reasons

findings.label: SSN Missing
findings.outreach_line: Your Social Security Number (SSN) is missing or invalid. Please provide your SSN to continue.

example.outreach_summary: Concatenated or grouped outreach_lines ordered by severity for use in email, SMS, or call script
